description: Google Chromium CSS contains a use-after-free vulnerability that could allow a remote attacker to potentially exploit heap corruption via a crafted HTML page.

BeyondTrust Remote Support (RS) and Privileged Remote Access (PRA) contain an OS command injection vulnerability that could allow an unauthenticated remote attacker to execute operating system commands.
Apple operating systems contain an improper restriction of operations within the bounds of a memory buffer vulnerability that could allow an attacker to execute arbitrary code.
Microsoft Configuration Manager contains an SQL injection vulnerability that could allow an unauthenticated attacker to execute commands on the server or underlying database.
Notepad++ contains a download of code without integrity check vulnerability that could allow arbitrary code execution during update process.
